Describe the sequence of scenes shown in the video clip.
canonical_answer: At 0s, a person in a grey hoodie stands near white kitchen cabinets; at 6s, a title card displays 'Epic Baking: Cookies' on a black background; at 18s, a male in a grey hoodie looks into an open refrigerator containing various jars.

question: What specific visual elements appear at the beginning, middle, and end of the clip?
canonical_answer: At 0s, a microwave is visible on the right side of the kitchen; at 6s, stylized white text appears centered on the screen; at 18s, a hand reaches into the refrigerator door shelf labeled cream cheese.
